steps.title: Check the first function
steps.content: For $f(x)=20(1.18)^x+38$, the base $1.18$ is greater than $1$. As $x$ increases for $x\ge0$, the function increases without bound, so it has no maximum value.

steps.title: Check the second function
steps.content:
For $g(x)=7(0.68)^x$, the base $0.68$ is between $0$ and $1$. The function decreases for $x\ge0$, so its maximum occurs at $x=0$.
$$
g(0)=7(0.68)^0=7
$$

steps.title: Choose the displayed maximum
steps.content: Only equation II displays its maximum value as a coefficient. The answer is B.
